title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 28 - How To Overcome Your Limiting Beliefs: Anna Hemmings
guest: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 28 - How To Overcome Your Limiting Beliefs

Iwouldn't be interested in necessarily where they've come from. I would be interested inhow are they serving us right now and how are they not servingus?
